title: Ultimate Potato
description: A hodgepodge of random mods that works with 24w14potato
body:
# A MODPACK FOR THE WEIRD POISONOUS POTATO UPDATE

```
(well it's more like a compilation of mods cos im an idiot so yeap)
```


But anyways, yeah, it's really nothing more than an optimized pack with some additions and quality-of-life mods. Feel free to request for more mods to be added!

Forked(? is that how you use that) from the 24w14potato version of [LavishlyOptimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/lavishly-optimized/version/1.5.4+fabric.24w14potato), which I used as a base and just kept downloading random stuff from modrinth from there :)
